name: My Resilience Reveal with Lisa Sinnott

episodes.title: From Cult Survivor to Kindness Cultivator: Kay Rowe’s Powerful Journey of Resilience and Renewal
episodes.description: In this inspiring episode of My Resilience Reveal with Lisa, Kay Rowe shares her courageous story of spending over three decades in a cult and the emotional journey of reclaiming her identity, freedom and voice. Today, Kay has transformed her pain into purpose as a kindness cultivator and freelance writer, helping others heal through compassion, connection, and truth. Her story is a powerful reminder that no matter how long you’ve been stuck in darkness, transformation is possible. #kindnessmatters #resilientwomen #cultlife
